summary: Hydrated GitHub state shows the original canonical tracker #45800 and all seed candidates are already closed. The canonical path is merged PR #73361, which added confirmation for button-triggered New Session resets, preserved typed /new and /reset behavior, added regression coverage, and was used by maintainers to close #27065, #45800, and #56611. No GitHub mutation, fix PR, or merge is planned; closed refs are retained only as historical/classification evidence.
